Title: Commission Role - Subject Matter Expert
Description: Need to add check mark & Tooltip  to control entered commission rates.

Title: Fix 'Other Account ID' propagation to use correct internal Account ID
Description: Correct the mapping/propagation logic so the 'Other Account ID' stored/propagated matches the intended internal Account ID field (not an incorrect unique identifier).
Acceptance Criteria: - When a deposit line is matched and IDs propagate, 'Other Account ID' references the correct internal Account ID value.; - Existing incorrect values are not reintroduced on subsequent matches.; - Add a regression test / reproducible scenario for this bug.
Notes/Dependencies: May require data cleanup for already-written incorrect IDs (ASSUMED: at least in test environments).

Title: Implement SME commission workflow (Opp checkbox + % field + tooltip; manual rate entry)
Description: Support Subject Matter Expert (SME) deals via a manual workflow: add SME checkbox + SME % field on Opportunity details; show tooltip during Add Product to instruct user to adjust commission rate manually (e.g., 50% reduction).
Acceptance Criteria: - Opportunity details includes SME boolean + SME percent.; - When SME is checked and user adds a product, a tooltip/inline helper text appears explaining the required rate adjustment.; - User can manually override the commission rate (e.g., change 16% to 8%).; - Core commission formulas are unchanged (manual adjustment is the mechanism).

Title: Template evolution: implement 'New Fields' + 'Exclude' tabs and auto-promote mapped fields
Description: In deposit field-mapping, separate unmapped deposit columns into 'New Fields' (unmapped fields that have values) vs 'Exclude' (blank/ignored). When users map new fields and save, those new mappings are added to the vendor template so subsequent uploads treat them as template fields.
Acceptance Criteria: - Mapping UI has 3 groups/tabs: Template Fields, New Fields, Exclude.; - New Fields shows only deposit columns that have at least one non-null value and are not yet in the template.; - Exclude contains deposit columns that are blank/ignored.; - After user maps New Fields + clicks Save, the template is updated; re-opening mapping shows those fields under Template Fields (and New Fields shrinks accordingly).; - No commission calculations change due to these metadata-only fields.
Notes/Dependencies: Dependency: vendor template data model must support adding new template fields at runtime.; Assumption: excluded fields are not persisted beyond the template unless needed for auditing.

Title: Template QA: compare Rob + brother deposit files; identify column deltas; build Colt Tower template
Description: Compare deposit file variants (Rob vs brother) to identify column differences and ensure the template evolution process works. Create/validate a Colt Tower template based on identified fields.
Acceptance Criteria: - Compare files and document columns that differ.; - Create/adjust Colt Tower template so both file variants map cleanly.; - Validate that new/different columns land in New Fields/Exclude as expected.; - Upload both variants successfully without breaking matching.
Notes/Dependencies: Dependency: needs deposit files available in test env.

Title: Reconciliation matching UI: optimize layout to show more schedules + reduce whitespace
Description: Adjust the deposit matching screen so users can see more relevant data without scrolling: target 7–8 deposit lines visible and more suggested revenue schedules visible. Move horizontal scrollbar up and reduce blank space.
Acceptance Criteria: - Top deposit-lines panel shows ~7–8 rows (or a right-side scrollbar after ~4–6 rows, per final UX decision).; - Bottom suggested matches panel shows ~10–11 revenue schedules (or enough to see the next product boundary).; - Horizontal scrollbar is positioned so it does not consume space needed for suggested matches.; - No UI overlap/clipping; works at common laptop resolutions.
Notes/Dependencies: From transcript: request to show less deposit line items at once and more suggested matches, move slider bar up, and see 7–8 rows more easily.

Title: Deposit matching: rename 'Account Name' header and remove hyperlinks for vendor-side fields
Description: In deposit matching, relabel the deposit-side 'Account Name' to clarify it is the vendor/deposit account value; also remove hyperlinks from fields like Other Product Name (and deposit-side account legal name equivalents) since they may not map to internal CRM records.
Acceptance Criteria: - Deposit-side grid column label 'Account Name' becomes 'Vendor/Deposit Account' (or similar).; - 'Other Product Name' in the deposit-side grid is rendered as plain text (no hyperlink).; - Any deposit-side field that is not guaranteed to map to an internal record does not hyperlink.

Title: Revenue Schedule detail: consolidate Vendor/Distributor/Customer ID fields into 'Other IDs'
Description: Simplify the Revenue Schedule detail page and underlying model by replacing redundant Vendor/Distributor/Customer ID fields with a single 'Other IDs' field (to align with Opportunity detail page).
Acceptance Criteria: - Revenue Schedule detail page shows a single 'Other IDs' field (and retains House ID if needed).; - Data model no longer requires separate Vendor/Distributor/Customer ID fields on Revenue Schedule.; - Existing screens that expect the separate fields are updated.; - Confirm how existing data migrates into 'Other IDs' (concatenate vs choose precedence).
Notes/Dependencies: Dependency: confirm whether House ID remains separate (seems to be kept). Migration rules are TBD → needs decision.

Title: Revenue schedule visibility: confirm date-filter fix + confidence threshold; add regression tests
Description: Follow-up after fixing missing revenue schedules: ensure schedule filtering by date is correct, confidence threshold changes are intentional/configurable, and schedule display ordering remains oldest-first (FIFO).
Acceptance Criteria: - Revenue schedules are not incorrectly filtered out due to date logic.; - Confidence threshold (used for showing matches) is set intentionally or made configurable.; - Suggested schedules display in oldest-first order where required.; - Regression tests cover the original missing-schedules scenario.
Notes/Dependencies: Meeting notes indicate a date filter bug was resolved and confidence threshold temporarily lowered to unblock testing.

Title: Redesign Product Creation form (2-column layout; required Part # + Description; status defaults Active)
Description: Update the Product Creation form UI and validation: two-column layout; require Part Number and Description; move House Part Number above divider; remove divider; Status field removed and defaults to Active.
Acceptance Criteria: - Form renders in 2 columns (responsive).; - Part Number and Description are required; validation prevents save without them.; - House Part Number is positioned above the divider (or divider removed per design).; - Status is not user-editable on the form and defaults to Active on create.; - Layout matches the agreed field ordering.
Hunter Development Notes: Remove Active Status. Default to active

Title: Make auto-expanding textarea behavior global
Description: Apply the auto-expanding textarea behavior to all multi-line text inputs across the app (e.g., description fields).
Acceptance Criteria: - All designated textarea fields auto-expand vertically as the user types.; - No layout breakage; scrollbars appear only when needed.; - Behavior is consistent across major browsers.

Title: Admin: create Templates management page (list templates A–Z by vendor)
Description: Add an Admin section page for managing vendor templates; list templates A–Z by vendor and provide entrypoint to view/edit templates.
Acceptance Criteria: - Admin nav includes Templates.; - Page lists templates sorted A–Z by vendor (and/or template name).; - Users can open a template to view/edit mappings (CRUD scope TBD).; - Access controlled to admin role(s).
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm whether non-admins can view templates (ASSUMED: admin-only).

Title: UAT: Rob to self-test deposit matching (create test instances/deposits) and report issues
Description: Rob to run hands-on testing of deposit matching and reconciliation by creating additional instances/deposits and attempting end-to-end matching; report any blockers/bugs found.
Acceptance Criteria: - Rob completes at least 2–3 test runs (including creating a new instance + uploading a deposit).; - Issues are documented with screenshots/steps and entered into backlog.; - Confirm whether any workflow 'trip-ups' require UI/logic changes.

Title: Provide updated Telarus deposit files for template variation testing
Description: Acquire and upload updated Telarus deposit files so templates can be tested against real-world variations.
Acceptance Criteria: - Updated deposit file(s) are provided and available in the shared testing location.; - At least one variation is included (different columns / products).; - Files are used to validate template evolution and matching.

Title: Backlog intake: Update log with items discussed from meetings & emails
Description: Process task: extract action items/requirements from the Friday PDF and the second email, and ensure all March 2 Fathom notes are captured in the shared Google Sheet backlog.
Acceptance Criteria: - Friday PDF reviewed and any actionable items are converted into tickets.; - Second email reviewed and converted into tickets.; - All March 2 Fathom notes items are represented in the shared backlog sheet.
Completion Status: Completed and will be ongoing to keep log up to date
